name: 1D DP — House Robber, Coin Change, LIS, Jump Game

metadata.career_relevance: Core DP patterns — highest-value DSA topic in senior interviews.

hook.what_you_will_build: 1D DP — House Robber, Coin Change, LIS, Jump Game

key_takeaways: House Robber: dp[i]=max(dp[i-1], dp[i-2]+nums[i]) → O(n) O(1)
Coin Change: dp[0]=0; dp[i]=min(dp[i-c]+1); init dp[amt+1]
LIS: O(n²) DP; O(n log n) patience sort (tails array)
Jump Game: greedy — track max_reach; if i>max_reach: stuck
Jump Game II: BFS layers — currEnd + farthest
Best Time to Buy/Sell Stock: min_so_far + max_profit
